actionConfiguration.body:
{
	"expense_date": "{{ JSONForm3.formData.General_Info.expense_date }}",
	"vendor_name": "{{ JSONForm3.formData.General_Info.vendor_name }}",
	"category_account_id": {{ JSONForm3.formData.General_Info.category_account_id }},
	"description": "{{ JSONForm3.formData.General_Info.description }}",

	"grand_total": {{ JSONForm3.formData.Financials.grand_total }},
	"taxable_amount": {{ JSONForm3.formData.Financials.taxable_amount || 0 }},
	"tax_amount": {{ JSONForm3.formData.Financials.tax_amount || 0 }},
	"is_gst_expense": {{ JSONForm3.formData.Financials.is_gst_expense }},
	"bill_no": "{{ JSONForm3.formData.Financials.bill_no }}",
	"gst_no": "{{ JSONForm3.formData.Financials.gst_no }}",

	"payment_mode": "{{ JSONForm3.formData.Payment_Details.payment_mode }}",
	"payment_source_id": {{ JSONForm3.formData.Payment_Details.payment_source_id }},
	"user_id": {{ getMe.data.id }},

	"reference_no": "{{ 
	JSONForm3.formData.Payment_Details.payment_mode === 'ONLINE' 
	? JSONForm3.formData.Payment_Details.reference_no 
	: (JSONForm3.formData.Payment_Details.payment_mode === 'CHEQUE' 
		 ? JSONForm3.formData.Payment_Details.cheque_no 
		 : JSONForm3.formData.Payment_Details.reference_no) 
	}}",

	"bank_statement_entry_id": {{ 
	JSONForm3.formData.Payment_Details.payment_mode === 'ONLINE' 
	? (JSONForm3.formData.Payment_Details.reference_no || null) 
	: null 
	}},

	"cheque_no": "{{ JSONForm3.formData.Payment_Details.cheque_no }}",
	"cheque_date": "{{ JSONForm3.formData.Payment_Details.cheque_date }}",
	"bank_name": "{{ JSONForm3.formData.Payment_Details.bank_name }}"
}
